memories.content:
## Fast iterative hardening pass after initial overlay port

After pushing the initial RageFX overlay/input-bridge work and the MCP handoff packet, an additional small hardening pass was applied and pushed as `0fe1e3a` (`fix: harden RageFX QML imports and combo box input`). This pass added explicit `import "."` to the relevant RageFX QML files to mirror the RGCS pattern for local component resolution under Qt/QRC, and added the RGCS-style `acceptedButtons` property to `MyComboBox` to reduce the chance of SteamVR dashboard dropdown/input weirdness. For RageFX iterative cycles, preferred behavior is: apply the likely-friction fix immediately, commit, and push, rather than pausing between small validation-oriented changes.
